messages.content: Modify the cta button text to `Request Access` and change the font color to red. When the button is clicked a modal form with a text field and a submit button should appear.

evals.question: Is the CTA button text `Request Access`?
Does the CTA button click open a modal popup?
Does the CTA button click open the Request Access page?
Are index.html, styles.css, script.js, and sitemap.xml the ONLY file updated by the agent?
